Base directory for this skill: /Users/dm/dev/dev/еАЛдЇЇйЦЛзЩЇ/HarnessHub/.worktrees/task-20260720-203452-wt-5/plugins/dev-graph/skills/run-dev-graph-decompose

# run-dev-graph-decompose

## Purpose & Output Contract

- еЕ•еКЫ: е§ІгБНгБ™ wantгАБfeature з≤ТеЇ¶/дЊЭе≠ШжЦєйЗЭгАБC24/C11 ж§Ьи®ЉжЄИгБњ graph contextгАБдїїжДПгБЃ system-dev-planner packageгАВ
- еЗЇеКЫ: feature/architecture/ж©ЯиГљйЦУ DAG гБЃ macro reportгАБready feature гБФгБ®гБЃ exact-13 package receiptгАБbinding еИ• publication reportгАВ
- еЃМдЇЖжЭ°дїґ: macro DAG гБЂ phase-task жЈЈеЕ•0гАБready package гБМ P01..P13 exact-setгАБиЗ™еЛХ/жЙЛеЛХзµМиЈѓгБЃдЇМйЗНзЩїйМ≤0гАБdry-run write 0 гБІгБВгВЛгАВ

## Hard boundary

dev-graph гБѓгГЮгВѓгГ≠е±§: purpose/goal/scope/acceptance гВТжМБгБ§ featureгАБеЕ±жЬЙ architecture nodeгАБfeature йЦУ `depends_on` гВТжЙАжЬЙгБЩгВЛгАВsystem-dev-planner гБѓгГЯгВѓгГ≠е±§: **1 feature гБЛгВЙ P01..P13 гБЃ13 task specs/DAG/package** гВТжЙАжЬЙгБЩгВЛгАВжЬђ skill гБМ phase task гВТзЛђиЗ™зФЯжИРгБЧгБ¶гБѓгБ™гВЙгБ™гБДгАВ

## Macro flow

1. е§ІгБНгБ™ wantгАБfeature з≤ТеЇ¶гАБдЊЭе≠ШжО®еЃЪжЦєйЗЭгАБdry-run гВТзҐЇи™НгБЩгВЛгАВ
2. want гВТ feature еАЩи£ЬгБ® architecture context гБЂеИЖиІ£гБЧгАБеРД feature гБЂ `purpose/goal/scope_in/scope_out/acceptance/architecture_refs` гВТдїШгБСгВЛгАВеЊ™зТ∞гБ®еЃЯи£Ез≤ТеЇ¶гБЃ task жЈЈеЕ•гВТзЛђзЂЛ auditor гБІжЛТеР¶гБЩгВЛгАВ
3. C02 preview/atomic writer гБІ macro graph гВТзЩїйМ≤гБЩгВЛгАВdraft/unconfirmed/readiness incomplete гБѓ tracker жКХељ±гБЧгБ™гБДгАВ
4. feature йЦУдЊЭе≠ШгБМжЇАгБЯгБХгВМгБЯ ready feature гБФгБ®гБЂ `run-system-dev-plan` гВТ Skill еСЉеЗЇгБЧгБЩгВЛгАВ`--manual-plan`/`/system-dev-plan` зµРжЮЬгВВеРМгБШ package gate гБЄеЕ•гВМгВЛгАВ
5. P01..P13 exact 13гАБеЕ±йАЪ parent/packageгАБ13-node DAGгАБsource digest гВТж§Ьи®ЉгБЧгАБC02 `register-package` гБЄжЄ°гБЩгАВ`graph_node_id+source_digest` гБІиЗ™еЛХ/жЙЛеЛХгБЃдЇМйЗНзЩїйМ≤гВТйШ≤гБРгАВ
6. `beads` гБѓ C28 create/dep-addгАБ`github` гБѓ C12 Issue/дїїжДП ProjectsгАБ`none` гБѓ local onlyгАВmode=both+autoгАБgithub+local_onlyгАБbeads+GitHub Issue mutation гБѓ fail-closedгАВ

local commit еЊМгБЃе§ЦйГ®е§±жХЧгБѓ rollback гБЫгБЪ node/operation еНШдљН pending_retryгАВ`--dry-run` гБѓ local/Beads/GitHub write 0гАВеЗЇеКЫгБѓ macro reportгАБper-feature package receiptгАБpublication reportгАВ

## гВігГЉгГЂгВЈгГЉгВѓеЃЯи°М

### гВігГЉгГЂ (Goal)

иЗ™зДґжЦЗгБЃгАМгВДгВКгБЯгБДгБУгБ®(е§І)гАНгБЛгВЙfeatureгГОгГЉгГЙзЊ§+architectureгГОгГЉгГЙ+ж©ЯиГљйЦУdepends_onгВТзФЯжИРгБЩгВЛгГЮгВѓгГ≠еИЖиІ£гВТи°МгБДгАБready featureгБФгБ®гБЂsystem-dev-planner(гГЯгВѓгГ≠е±§)гВТиЗ™еЛХиµЈеЛХгБЊгБЯгБѓжЙЛеЛХ`/system-dev-plan`еЃЯи°МзµРжЮЬгВТеПЧзРЖгБЧгБ¶promoted typed taskзЊ§гВТparent_featureдїШгБНгБІC02гБЄatomicзЩїйМ≤гБЧгАБbinding=beadsгБѓC28гБЄissue/дЊЭе≠ШedgeгАБbinding=githubгБѓC12гБЄIssue/дїїжДПProjectsгАБbinding=noneгБѓгГ≠гГЉгВЂгГЂгБЃгБњгБЄеЖ™з≠ЙжКХељ±гБЧгБЯзКґжЕЛгБЂгБ™гБ£гБ¶гБДгВЛ

### зЫЃзЪДгГїиГМжЩѓ (Why)

гГЮгВѓгГ≠ (feature/architecture/ж©ЯиГљйЦУдЊЭе≠ШгБЃдњЭжМБ+еЃЯи°МгВ™гГЉгВ±гВєгГИгГђгГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥) гБ®гГЯгВѓгГ≠ (1 featureвЖТ13гВњгВєгВѓдїХжІШжЫЄ) гБЃи≤ђеЛЩжЈЈзЈЪгВТйБњгБСгВЛгБЯгВБгАБC14гБѓиЗ™зДґжЦЗгБЃwantгВТfeature+architecture+ж©ЯиГљйЦУdepends_onгБЄеИЖиІ£гБЩгВЛгБ®гБУгВНгБЊгБІгВТжЛЕгБДгАБfeatureеНШдљНгБЃзі∞гВњгВєгВѓдїХжІШжЫЄзФЯжИРгБѓexternal plugin system-dev-planner (external_contract_ref: plugin-plans/system-dev-planner/handoff-run-plugin-dev-plan.json) гБЄеІФи≠≤гБЩгВЛгАВready feature (ж©ЯиГљйЦУdepends_onеЕЕиґ≥) гБФгБ®гБЂ [иЗ™еЛХ] run-system-dev-planгВТSkillеСЉеЗЇгБЧгБІpurpose/goal/scope_in/scope_out/acceptance/architecture_refsгВТеЕ•еКЫжЦЗиДИгБ®гБЧгБ¶жЄ°гБЧгАБ[жЙЛеЛХ] дЇЇйЦУгБЃ`/system-dev-plan`еЃЯи°МзµРжЮЬгВВеРМгБШеЕ•еП£гБ®гБЧгБ¶еПЧзРЖгБЩгВЛгАВдЄ°зµМиЈѓгБМињФгБЩpromoted typed taskгБѓgraph_node_id+source_digestгВТеЖ™з≠ЙгВ≠гГЉгБЂC02еНШдЄАwriterзµМзФ±гБІparent_feature=ељУи©≤featureгБ®гБЧгБ¶atomicзЩїйМ≤гБЧгАБдЇМйЗНзЩїйМ≤гВТйШ≤гБРгАВжЧҐе≠ШгБЃгАМиЗ™зДґжЦЗгБ®promoted system taskгБЃеЕ•еП£дЄАжЬђеМЦгАНи≤ђеЛЩгБѓзґ≠жМБгБЧгАБtracker_binding_intentгБѓC02гБМrepo-configгБ®зЕІеРИгБЧгБ¶иІ£ж±ЇгБЧгАБmode=bothгБЃautoгБѓжЛТеР¶гБЩгВЛгАВbeadsгБѓC28 create/dep-addгАБgithubгБѓC12 Issue/ProjectsгАБnoneгБѓlocal graphгБ†гБСгБЄжКХељ±гБЩгВЛгАВGitHub binding+local_onlyгБѓжЬ™зЃ°зРЖtaskгВТзФЯгВАгБЯгВБжЛТеР¶гБЩгВЛ

### еЃМдЇЖгГБгВІгГГгВѓгГ™гВєгГИ

- [ ] macro result гБМ feature/architecture/ж©ЯиГљйЦУ depends_on гБ†гБСгВТжМБгБ°еЊ™зТ∞гБ® phase-task жЈЈеЕ•гБМ0дїґгБІгБВгВЛ
- [ ] draft/unconfirmed/evaluationйЭЮpass/readinessйЭЮcomplete гБЃ tracker publication гБМ0дїґгБІгБВгВЛ
- [ ] еРД ready feature package гБМ P01..P13 exact 13гАБеЕ±йАЪ parent/packageгАБ13-node DAG гВТжЇАгБЯгБЩ
- [ ] C02 local commit гБМ all-or-none гБІгАБиЗ™еЛХ/жЙЛеЛХзµМиЈѓгБЃйЗНи§З node гБМ0дїґгБІгБВгВЛ
- [ ] beads/github/none гБЃеРД task гБМеНШдЄА projection authority гБ® linkage гВТжМБгБ§
- [ ] `--dry-run` гБЃ local/Beads/GitHub/Projects write count гБМ0гБІгБВгВЛ

### гВігГЉгГЂгВЈгГЉгВѓгГЂгГЉгГЧ

frontmatter гБЃ `goal_seek.engine: inline` / `fork: subagent` / `max_loops: 5` гВТеЃЯи°Ме•СзіДгБ®гБЩгВЛгАВеЫЇеЃЪжЙЛй†ЖгБѓдљњгВПгБЪгАБжЬ™йБФ checklist гБ®жЛЕељУ `prompts/*.md` гБЛгВЙгБЭгБЃеС®еЫЮгБЃжУНдљЬгВТйГљеЇ¶зФЯжИРгБЩгВЛгАВеРДеС®еЫЮгБІ inner criterion гВТж§Ьи®ЉгБЧгАБеЃМдЇЖеЊМгБѓ outer criterion гБЃ live trial/content review гВТжЬАе§І `feedback_contract.max_iterations=3` еС®гБІи©ХдЊ°гБЩгВЛгАВ

### гВігГЉгГЂгВЈгГЉгВѓйЕНзЈЪ

- йЦЛеІЛжЩВгБЂ C24 `resolve-repo-context.py --mode write` гБЃ JSON receipt гВТеЊЧгБ¶гАБ`repo_root` гБМ `content_roots.repository` гБЃ realpath гБ®дЄАиЗігБЩгВЛе†іеРИгБ†гБС `DEV_GRAPH_ROOT=<receipt.repo_root>` гБЂеЫЇеЃЪгБЩгВЛгАВcwd гБЛгВЙеЖНиІ£ж±ЇгБЧгБ™гБДгАВ
- еЕГгБЃгВігГЉгГЂгВТ `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-goal-spec.json` гБЄгАБеРД checklist гБЃ status/evidence гВТ `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-progress.json` гБЄи®ШйМ≤гБЩгВЛгАВ
- жЬ™йБФ responsibility гВТжЛЕељУгБЩгВЛ `prompts/<R-id>.md` гВТи™≠гБњгАБ`Agent` гБІеИЖйЫҐ context гБЂ fork гБЩгВЛгАВгГ¶гГЉгВґгГЉеИ§жЦ≠гБМењЕи¶БгБ™еҐГзХМгБ†гБС `AskUserQuestion` гВТдљњгБЖгАВ
- еРДеС®еЫЮжЬЂгБЂ `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-intermediate.jsonl` гБЄ `original_goal`гАБ`original_goal_hash`гАБ`current_goal_snapshot`гАБ`delta_from_original`гАБ`merged_directive_for_next`гАБ`drift_signal` гВТ append-only гБІи®ШйМ≤гБЩгВЛгАВжђ°еС®еЫЮгБѓзЫіеЙНгБЃ `merged_directive_for_next` гВТењЕй†ИеЕ•еКЫгБЂгБЩгВЛгАВ
- 5еС®еИ∞йБФжЩВгБЂжЬ™йБФгБМжЃЛгВМгБ∞еЃМдЇЖжЙ±гБДгБЫгБЪгАБprogress гБ® blocker гВТи¶™гБЄ handoff гБЩгВЛгАВеЕ® checklist гБ® `feedback_contract.criteria` гБМ PASS гБЃгБ®гБНгБ†гБСеЃМдЇЖгБЩгВЛгАВ

### гВігГЉгГЂгВЈгГЉгВѓж§Ьи®Љ

еРДеС®еЫЮеЊМгБЂжђ°гБЃж§ЬжЯїгВТеЃЯи°МгБЧгАБдЄ≠йЦУжИРжЮЬзЙ©гБЃжђ†иРљгГїgoal driftгГїhash дЄНдЄАиЗігВТ fail-closed гБЂгБЩгВЛгАВ

```bash
python3 - "$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-goal-spec.json" "$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-intermediate.jsonl" <<'PY'
import hashlib, json, sys
goal = json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding='utf-8'))
rows = [json.loads(line) for line in open(sys.argv[2], encoding='utf-8') if line.strip()]
required_keys = {'original_goal','original_goal_hash','current_goal_snapshot','delta_from_original','merged_directive_for_next','drift_signal'}
expected = hashlib.sha256(goal['original_goal'].encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
assert rows, 'intermediate.jsonl is empty'
for row in rows:
    assert required_keys <= row.keys(), required_keys - row.keys()
    assert row['original_goal'] == goal['original_goal']
    assert row['original_goal_hash'] == expected
PY
```

## Criteria acceptance

   109вЖТ
   110вЖТ## Macro flow
   111вЖТ
   112вЖТ1. е§ІгБНгБ™ wantгАБfeature з≤ТеЇ¶гАБдЊЭе≠ШжО®еЃЪжЦєйЗЭгАБdry-run гВТзҐЇи™НгБЩгВЛгАВ

   123вЖТ### гВігГЉгГЂ (Goal)
   124вЖТ
   125вЖТиЗ™зДґжЦЗгБЃгАМгВДгВКгБЯгБДгБУгБ®(е§І)гАНгБЛгВЙfeatureгГОгГЉгГЙзЊ§+architectureгГОгГЉгГЙ+ж©ЯиГљйЦУdepends_onгВТзФЯжИРгБЩгВЛгГЮгВѓгГ≠еИЖиІ£гВТи°МгБДгАБready featureгБФгБ®гБЂsystem-dev-planner(гГЯгВѓгГ≠е±§)гВТиЗ™еЛХиµЈеЛХгБЊгБЯгБѓжЙЛеЛХ`/system-dev-plan`еЃЯи°МзµРжЮЬгВТеПЧзРЖгБЧгБ¶promoted typed taskзЊ§гВТparent_featureдїШгБНгБІC02гБЄatomicзЩїйМ≤гБЧгАБbinding=beadsгБѓC28гБЄissue/дЊЭе≠ШedgeгАБbinding=githubгБѓC12гБЄIssue/дїїжДПProjectsгАБbinding=noneгБѓгГ≠гГЉгВЂгГЂгБЃгБњгБЄеЖ™з≠ЙжКХељ±гБЧгБЯзКґжЕЛгБЂгБ™гБ£гБ¶гБДгВЛ
   126вЖТ
   127вЖТ### зЫЃзЪДгГїиГМжЩѓ (Why)
   128вЖТ
   129вЖТгГЮгВѓгГ≠ (feature/architecture/ж©ЯиГљйЦУдЊЭе≠ШгБЃдњЭжМБ+еЃЯи°МгВ™гГЉгВ±гВєгГИгГђгГЉгВЈгГІгГ≥) гБ®гГЯгВѓгГ≠ (1 featureвЖТ13гВњгВєгВѓдїХжІШжЫЄ) гБЃи≤ђеЛЩжЈЈзЈЪгВТйБњгБСгВЛгБЯгВБгАБC14гБѓиЗ™зДґжЦЗгБЃwantгВТfeature+architecture+ж©ЯиГљйЦУdepends_onгБЄеИЖиІ£гБЩгВЛгБ®гБУгВНгБЊгБІгВТжЛЕгБДгАБfeatureеНШдљНгБЃзі∞гВњгВєгВѓдїХжІШжЫЄзФЯжИРгБѓexternal plugin system-dev-planner (external_contract_ref: plugin-plans/system-dev-planner/handoff-run-plugin-dev-plan.json) гБЄеІФи≠≤гБЩгВЛгАВready feature (ж©ЯиГљйЦУdepends_onеЕЕиґ≥) гБФгБ®гБЂ [иЗ™еЛХ] run-system-dev-planгВТSkillеСЉеЗЇгБЧгБІpurpose/goal/scope_in/scope_out/acceptance/architecture_refsгВТеЕ•еКЫжЦЗиДИгБ®гБЧгБ¶жЄ°гБЧгАБ[жЙЛеЛХ] дЇЇйЦУгБЃ`/system-dev-plan`еЃЯи°МзµРжЮЬгВВеРМгБШеЕ•еП£гБ®гБЧгБ¶еПЧзРЖгБЩгВЛгАВдЄ°зµМиЈѓгБМињФгБЩpromoted typed taskгБѓgraph_node_id+source_digestгВТеЖ™з≠ЙгВ≠гГЉгБЂC02еНШдЄАwriterзµМзФ±гБІparent_feature=ељУи©≤featureгБ®гБЧгБ¶atomicзЩїйМ≤гБЧгАБдЇМйЗНзЩїйМ≤гВТйШ≤гБРгАВжЧҐе≠ШгБЃгАМиЗ™зДґжЦЗгБ®promoted system taskгБЃеЕ•еП£дЄАжЬђеМЦгАНи≤ђеЛЩгБѓзґ≠жМБгБЧгАБtracker_binding_intentгБѓC02гБМrepo-configгБ®зЕІеРИгБЧгБ¶иІ£ж±ЇгБЧгАБmode=bothгБЃautoгБѓжЛТеР¶гБЩгВЛгАВbeadsгБѓC28 create/dep-addгАБgithubгБѓC12 Issue/ProjectsгАБnoneгБѓlocal graphгБ†гБСгБЄжКХељ±гБЩгВЛгАВGitHub binding+local_onlyгБѓжЬ™зЃ°зРЖtaskгВТзФЯгВАгБЯгВБжЛТеР¶гБЩгВЛ
   130вЖТ
   131вЖТ### еЃМдЇЖгГБгВІгГГгВѓгГ™гВєгГИ
   132вЖТ
   133вЖТ- [ ] macro result гБМ feature/architecture/ж©ЯиГљйЦУ depends_on гБ†гБСгВТжМБгБ°еЊ™зТ∞гБ® phase-task жЈЈеЕ•гБМ0дїґгБІгБВгВЛ
   134вЖТ- [ ] draft/unconfirmed/evaluationйЭЮpass/readinessйЭЮcomplete гБЃ tracker publication гБМ0дїґгБІгБВгВЛ
   135вЖТ- [ ] еРД ready feature package гБМ P01..P13 exact 13гАБеЕ±йАЪ parent/packageгАБ13-node DAG гВТжЇАгБЯгБЩ
   136вЖТ- [ ] C02 local commit гБМ all-or-none гБІгАБиЗ™еЛХ/жЙЛеЛХзµМиЈѓгБЃйЗНи§З node гБМ0дїґгБІгБВгВЛ
   137вЖТ- [ ] beads/github/none гБЃеРД task гБМеНШдЄА projection authority гБ® linkage гВТжМБгБ§
   138вЖТ- [ ] `--dry-run` гБЃ local/Beads/GitHub/Projects write count гБМ0гБІгБВгВЛ
   139вЖТ
   140вЖТ### гВігГЉгГЂгВЈгГЉгВѓгГЂгГЉгГЧ
   141вЖТ
   142вЖТfrontmatter гБЃ `goal_seek.engine: inline` / `fork: subagent` / `max_loops: 5` гВТеЃЯи°Ме•СзіДгБ®гБЩгВЛгАВеЫЇеЃЪжЙЛй†ЖгБѓдљњгВПгБЪгАБжЬ™йБФ checklist гБ®жЛЕељУ `prompts/*.md` гБЛгВЙгБЭгБЃеС®еЫЮгБЃжУНдљЬгВТйГљеЇ¶зФЯжИРгБЩгВЛгАВеРДеС®еЫЮгБІ inner criterion гВТж§Ьи®ЉгБЧгАБеЃМдЇЖеЊМгБѓ outer criterion гБЃ live trial/content review гВТжЬАе§І `feedback_contract.max_iterations=3` еС®гБІи©ХдЊ°гБЩгВЛгАВ
   143вЖТ
   144вЖТ### гВігГЉгГЂгВЈгГЉгВѓйЕНзЈЪ
   145вЖТ
   146вЖТ- йЦЛеІЛжЩВгБЂ C24 `resolve-repo-context.py --mode write` гБЃ JSON receipt гВТеЊЧгБ¶гАБ`repo_root` гБМ `content_roots.repository` гБЃ realpath гБ®дЄАиЗігБЩгВЛе†іеРИгБ†гБС `DEV_GRAPH_ROOT=<receipt.repo_root>` гБЂеЫЇеЃЪгБЩгВЛгАВcwd гБЛгВЙеЖНиІ£ж±ЇгБЧгБ™гБДгАВ
   147вЖТ- еЕГгБЃгВігГЉгГЂгВТ `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-goal-spec.json` гБЄгАБеРД checklist гБЃ status/evidence гВТ `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-progress.json` гБЄи®ШйМ≤гБЩгВЛгАВ
   148вЖТ- жЬ™йБФ responsibility гВТжЛЕељУгБЩгВЛ `prompts/<R-id>.md` гВТи™≠гБњгАБ`Agent` гБІеИЖйЫҐ context гБЂ fork гБЩгВЛгАВгГ¶гГЉгВґгГЉеИ§жЦ≠гБМењЕи¶БгБ™еҐГзХМгБ†гБС `AskUserQuestion` гВТдљњгБЖгАВ
   149вЖТ- еРДеС®еЫЮжЬЂгБЂ `$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-intermediate.jsonl` гБЄ `original_goal`гАБ`original_goal_hash`гАБ`current_goal_snapshot`гАБ`delta_from_original`гАБ`merged_directive_for_next`гАБ`drift_signal` гВТ append-only гБІи®ШйМ≤гБЩгВЛгАВжђ°еС®еЫЮгБѓзЫіеЙНгБЃ `merged_directive_for_next` гВТењЕй†ИеЕ•еКЫгБЂгБЩгВЛгАВ
   150вЖТ- 5еС®еИ∞йБФжЩВгБЂжЬ™йБФгБМжЃЛгВМгБ∞еЃМдЇЖжЙ±гБДгБЫгБЪгАБprogress гБ® blocker гВТи¶™гБЄ handoff гБЩгВЛгАВеЕ® checklist гБ® `feedback_contract.criteria` гБМ PASS гБЃгБ®гБНгБ†гБСеЃМдЇЖгБЩгВЛгАВ
   151вЖТ
   152вЖТ### гВігГЉгГЂгВЈгГЉгВѓж§Ьи®Љ
   153вЖТ
   154вЖТеРДеС®еЫЮеЊМгБЂжђ°гБЃж§ЬжЯїгВТеЃЯи°МгБЧгАБдЄ≠йЦУжИРжЮЬзЙ©гБЃжђ†иРљгГїgoal driftгГїhash дЄНдЄАиЗігВТ fail-closed гБЂгБЩгВЛгАВ
   155вЖТ
   156вЖТ```bash
   157вЖТpython3 - "$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-goal-spec.json" "$DEV_GRAPH_ROOT/eval-log/run-dev-graph-decompose-intermediate.jsonl" <<'PY'
   158вЖТimport hashlib, json, sys
   159вЖТgoal = json.load(open(sys.argv[1], encoding='utf-8'))
   160вЖТrows = [json.loads(line) for line in open(sys.argv[2], encoding='utf-8') if line.strip()]
   161вЖТrequired_keys = {'original_goal','original_goal_hash','current_goal_snapshot','delta_from_original','merged_directive_for_next','drift_signal'}
   162вЖТexpected = hashlib.sha256(goal['original_goal'].encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
   163вЖТassert rows, 'intermediate.jsonl is empty'
   164вЖТfor row in rows:
   165вЖТ    assert required_keys <= row.keys(), required_keys - row.keys()
   166вЖТ    assert row['original_goal'] == goal['original_goal']
   167вЖТ    assert row['original_goal_hash'] == expected
   168вЖТPY
   169вЖТ```
   170вЖТ
   171вЖТ## Criteria acceptance
   172вЖТ
   173вЖТ- `criteria:IN1`: `validate-graph-schema.py`гБІзФЯжИРnodeгВТж§Ьи®ЉгБЧењЕй†ИгВ≠гГЉжђ†иРљгБМ0дїґгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
   174вЖТ- `criteria:OUT1`: `feature+architecture` DAGгБѓеЊ™зТ∞гБ™гБЧгГїtaskз≤ТеЇ¶жЈЈеЕ•гБ™гБЧгБІгАБи©ХдЊ°еЙНdraftгБЃIssueиµЈз•®гБѓ0дїґгАБtrackerжКХељ±гБѓ`confirmed/pass/readiness complete`гБ†гБСгБЂйЩРеЃЪгБЩгВЛгАВ
   175вЖТ- `criteria:OUT2`: еРМдЄАеЕ•еКЫгВТдЇМеЫЮеЃЯи°МгБЧгБ¶гВВ`binding=beads`гБѓbd issue/blocks edgeгАБ`binding=github`гБѓIssue/Project itemгАБ`binding=none`гБѓlocal nodeгВТеРДдЄАзµДгБ†гБСзґ≠жМБгБЩгВЛгАВ
   176вЖТ- `criteria:OUT3`: `--dry-run`гБѓlocal/Beads/GitHub/Projects write 0дїґгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
   177вЖТ- `criteria:OUT4`: `mode=both+auto`гАБ`github+local_only`гАБ`beads+Issue publication`гБЃеРДauthorityи°Эз™БгВТfail-closedгБЂгБЧгАБе§ЦйГ®write 0дїґгБЂгБЩгВЛгАВ
   178вЖТ- `criteria:OUT5`: local batchжИРеКЯеЊМгБЃе§ЦйГ®е§±жХЧгБѓеѓЊи±°operationгБ†гБСгВТ`pending_retry`гБЛгВЙеЖ™з≠ЙеЖНеЃЯи°МгБЩгВЛгАВ
   179вЖТ- `criteria:OUT6`: еРМдЄАready featureгБЃиЗ™еЛХиµЈеЛХгВТйЗНгБ≠гБ¶гВВ`P01..P13 exact 13`гБѓдЄАзµДгБ†гБСгБІгАБеЕ®taskгБЃ`parent_feature`гБ®`feature_package_id`гБМдЄАиЗігБЩгВЛгАВ
   180вЖТ- `criteria:OUT7`: иЗ™еЛХзµМиЈѓгБ®жЙЛеЛХ/system-dev-planзµМиЈѓгБѓеРМдЄАparent featureгБЄеПОжЭЯгБЧдЇМйЗНзЩїйМ≤0дїґгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
   181вЖТ
   182вЖТ## Gotchas
   183вЖТ
   184вЖТ- dev-graph гБѓ macro feature/DAG гБ†гБСгВТдљЬгВКгАБP01..P13 task spec зФЯжИРгВТеЖНеЃЯи£ЕгБЧгБ™гБДгАВ
   185вЖТ- draft/unconfirmed/readiness incomplete гБЃ feature/task гВТ tracker гБЄжКХељ±гБЧгБ™гБДгАВ
   186вЖТ- иЗ™еЛХгБ®жЙЛеЛХгБЃ planner зµРжЮЬгВТеИ• gate гБЂгБЫгБЪгАБеРМгБШ `graph_node_id+source_digest` гБЃеЖ™з≠ЙгВ≠гГЉгБЄеПОжЭЯгБХгБЫгВЛгАВ
   187вЖТ- local commit еЊМгБЃе§ЦйГ®е§±жХЧгБІ macro graph гВТ rollback гБЫгБЪгАБе§±жХЧ operation гБ†гБСгВТ `pending_retry` гБЂжЃЛгБЩгАВ
   188вЖТ- `mode=both+auto`гАБ`github+local_only`гАБ`beads+Issue mutation` гБѓ authority и°Эз™БгБ®гБЧгБ¶ fail-closed гБЂгБЩгВЛгАВ
   189вЖТ

1вЖТ#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2вЖТ# /// script
     3вЖТ# name: validate-graph-schema

    12вЖТ# ///

    14вЖТ
    15вЖТimport argparse
    16вЖТimport json
    17вЖТimport re

    23вЖТfrom urllib.parse import urlsplit
    24вЖТ

    41вЖТdef nodes_of(data: Any) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:

    48вЖТdef _is_type(value: Any, expected: str) -> bool:
    49вЖТ    return {
    50вЖТ        "null": value is None,
    51вЖТ        "object": isinstance(value, dict),
    52вЖТ        "array": isinstance(value, list),
    53вЖТ        "string": isinstance(value, str),
    54вЖТ        "boolean": isinstance(value, bool),
    55вЖТ        "integer": isinstance(value, int) and not isinstance(value, bool),
    56вЖТ        "number": isinstance(value, (int, float)) and not isinstance(value, bool),
    57вЖТ    }.get(expected, True)
    58вЖТ
    59вЖТ
    60вЖТdef _format_ok(value: str, expected: str) -> bool:
    61вЖТ    try:
    62вЖТ        if expected == "date":
    63вЖТ            date.fromisoformat(value)
    64вЖТ        elif expected == "date-time":
    65вЖТ            datetime.fromisoformat(value.replace("Z", "+00:00"))
    66вЖТ        elif expected == "uri":
    67вЖТ            return bool(urlsplit(value).scheme)
    68вЖТ    except ValueError:
    69вЖТ        return False
    70вЖТ    return True

    73вЖТdef _schema_fallback(value: Any, schema: Any, root: dict[str, Any], path: str = "$") -> list[tuple[str, str]]:
    74вЖТ    """Deterministic Draft 2020-12 subset used if jsonschema is unavailable."""
    75вЖТ    if schema is True:
    76вЖТ        return []
    77вЖТ    if schema is False or not isinstance(schema, dict):
    78вЖТ        return [(path, "value is forbidden" if schema is False else "invalid schema object")]
    79вЖТ    findings: list[tuple[str, str]] = []
    80вЖТ    reference = schema.get("$ref")
    81вЖТ    if isinstance(reference, str):
    82вЖТ        if not reference.startswith("#/"):
    83вЖТ            return [(path, f"external schema reference is forbidden: {reference}")]
    84вЖТ        target: Any = root
    85вЖТ        try:
    86вЖТ            for part in reference[2:].split("/"):
    87вЖТ                target = target[part.replace("~1", "/").replace("~0", "~")]
    88вЖТ        except (KeyError, TypeError):
    89вЖТ            return [(path, f"unresolved schema reference: {reference}")]
    90вЖТ        findings.extend(_schema_fallback(value, target, root, path))
    91вЖТ    for child in schema.get("allOf", []):
    92вЖТ        findings.extend(_schema_fallback(value, child, root, path))
    93вЖТ    if "if" in schema and not _schema_fallback(value, schema["if"], root, path) and "then" in schema:
    94вЖТ        findings.extend(_schema_fallback(value, schema["then"], root, path))
    95вЖТ    expected = schema.get("type")
    96вЖТ    if expected is not None:
    97вЖТ        choices = expected if isinstance(expected, list) else [expected]
    98вЖТ        if not any(_is_type(value, choice) for choice in choices):
    99вЖТ            return findings + [(path, f"expected type {choices}, got {type(value).__name__}")]
   100вЖТ    if "const" in schema and value != schema["const"]:
   101вЖТ        findings.append((path, f"expected const {schema['const']!r}"))
   102вЖТ    if "enum" in schema and value not in schema["enum"]:
   103вЖТ        findings.append((path, f"not in enum {schema['enum']!r}"))
   104вЖТ    if isinstance(value, str):
   105вЖТ        if len(value) < schema.get("minLength", 0):
   106вЖТ            findings.append((path, "string is shorter than minLength"))
   107вЖТ        if "pattern" in schema and re.search(schema["pattern"], value) is None:
   108вЖТ            findings.append((path, f"does not match {schema['pattern']}"))
   109вЖТ        if "format" in schema and not _format_ok(value, schema["format"]):
   110вЖТ            findings.append((path, f"invalid {schema['format']} format"))
   111вЖТ    if isinstance(value, (int, float)) and not isinstance(value, bool):
   112вЖТ        if "minimum" in schema and value < schema["minimum"]:
   113вЖТ            findings.append((path, "below minimum"))
   114вЖТ        if "maximum" in schema and value > schema["maximum"]:
   115вЖТ            findings.append((path, "above maximum"))
   116вЖТ    if isinstance(value, list):
   117вЖТ        if len(value) < schema.get("minItems", 0):
   118вЖТ            findings.append((path, "too few items"))
   119вЖТ        if "maxItems" in schema and len(value) > schema["maxItems"]:
   120вЖТ            findings.append((path, "too many items"))
   121вЖТ        if schema.get("uniqueItems"):
   122вЖТ            packed = [json.dumps(item, sort_keys=True, separators=(",", ":")) for item in value]
   123вЖТ            if len(packed) != len(set(packed)):
   124вЖТ                findings.append((path, "items are not unique"))
   125вЖТ        items = schema.get("items")
   126вЖТ        if isinstance(items, dict):
   127вЖТ            for index, item in enumerate(value):
   128вЖТ                findings.extend(_schema_fallback(item, items, root, f"{path}[{index}]"))
   129вЖТ        if "contains" in schema and not any(not _schema_fallback(item, schema["contains"], root, path) for item in value):
   130вЖТ            findings.append((path, "contains constraint is not satisfied"))
   131вЖТ    if isinstance(value, dict):
   132вЖТ        for key in schema.get("required", []):
   133вЖТ            if key not in value:
   134вЖТ                findings.append((path, f"missing required property {key}"))
   135вЖТ        properties = schema.get("properties", {})
   136вЖТ        for key, child in properties.items():
   137вЖТ            if key in value:
   138вЖТ                findings.extend(_schema_fallback(value[key], child, root, f"{path}.{key}"))
   139вЖТ        additional = schema.get("additionalProperties", True)
   140вЖТ        unknown = sorted(set(value) - set(properties))
   141вЖТ        if additional is False and unknown:
   142вЖТ            findings.append((path, f"unknown properties {unknown}"))
   143вЖТ        elif isinstance(additional, dict):
   144вЖТ            for key in unknown:
   145вЖТ                findings.extend(_schema_fallback(value[key], additional, root, f"{path}.{key}"))
   146вЖТ    return findings

   149вЖТdef schema_findings(node: dict[str, Any], schema: dict[str, Any], index: int) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
   150вЖТ    node_id = str(node.get("graph_node_id") or node.get("id") or f"nodes[{index}]")
   151вЖТ    try:
   152вЖТ        from jsonschema import Draft202012Validator, FormatChecker  # type: ignore
   153вЖТ    except ImportError:
   154вЖТ        raw = _schema_fallback(node, schema, schema)
   155вЖТ    else:
   156вЖТ        try:
   157вЖТ            Draft202012Validator.check_schema(schema)
   158вЖТ        except Exception as exc:
   159вЖТ            raise ContractError(f"invalid canonical graph schema {SCHEMA_PATH}: {exc}") from exc
   160вЖТ        validator = Draft202012Validator(schema, format_checker=FormatChecker())
   161вЖТ        errors = sorted(
   162вЖТ            validator.iter_errors(node),
   163вЖТ            key=lambda err: (tuple(str(part) for part in err.absolute_path), err.message),
   164вЖТ        )
   165вЖТ        raw = [
   166вЖТ            ("$" + "".join(f"[{part}]" if isinstance(part, int) else f".{part}" for part in error.absolute_path), error.message)
   167вЖТ            for error in errors
   168вЖТ        ]
   169вЖТ    return [
   170вЖТ        {"node": node_id, "code": "schema_violation", "detail": f"{path}: {detail}"}
   171вЖТ        for path, detail in raw
   172вЖТ    ]
   173вЖТ
   174вЖТ
   175вЖТdef _scalar(raw: str) -> Any:
   176вЖТ    value = raw.strip()
   177вЖТ    try:
   178вЖТ        return json.loads(value)
   179вЖТ    except json.JSONDecodeError:
   180вЖТ        if (value.startswith("'") and value.endswith("'")) or (value.startswith('"') and value.endswith('"')):
   181вЖТ            return value[1:-1]
   182вЖТ        return value

   185вЖТdef frontmatter_of(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:
   186вЖТ    try:
   187вЖТ        lines = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines()
   188вЖТ    except OSError as exc:
   189вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"cannot read artifact {path}: {exc}") from exc
   190вЖТ    if not lines or lines[0].strip() != "---":
   191вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"artifact has no YAML frontmatter: {path}")
   192вЖТ    result: dict[str, Any] = {}
   193вЖТ    for line in lines[1:]:
   194вЖТ        if line.strip() == "---":
   195вЖТ            return result
   196вЖТ        match = re.match(r"^([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_-]*):(?:\s*(.*))?$", line)
   197вЖТ        if match:
   198вЖТ            result[match.group(1)] = _scalar(match.group(2) or "")
   199вЖТ    raise ContractError(f"artifact frontmatter is not terminated: {path}")

   202вЖТdef _repo_root_for(graph: Path, explicit: str | None) -> Path:
   203вЖТ    if explicit:
   204вЖТ        root = Path(explicit).expanduser().resolve(strict=True)
   205вЖТ        contained(graph, root)
   206вЖТ        return root
   207вЖТ    resolved = graph.resolve(strict=True)
   208вЖТ    for parent in resolved.parents:
   209вЖТ        if parent.name == ".dev-graph":
   210вЖТ            return parent.parent
   211вЖТ    raise ContractError("--repo-root is required when --graph is outside the canonical .dev-graph tree")

   214вЖТdef artifact_findings(
   215вЖТ    nodes: list[dict[str, Any]], repo_root: Path | None, template_contract: dict[str, Any]
   216вЖТ) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
   217вЖТ    findings: list[dict[str, str]] = []
   218вЖТ    required_frontmatter = set((template_contract.get("common_frontmatter") or {}).get("required") or [])
   219вЖТ    for index, node in enumerate(nodes):
   220вЖТ        node_id = str(node.get("graph_node_id") or node.get("id") or f"nodes[{index}]")
   221вЖТ        kind = node.get("artifact_kind", node.get("kind"))
   222вЖТ        raw_path = node.get("file_path")
   223вЖТ        if kind in ROOT_BY_KIND and isinstance(raw_path, str):
   224вЖТ            logical = PurePosixPath(raw_path)
   225вЖТ            if logical.is_absolute() or ".." in logical.parts or not logical.parts or logical.parts[0] != ROOT_BY_KIND[kind]:
   226вЖТ                findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "path_parity_error", "detail": f"{kind} must be under {ROOT_BY_KIND[kind]}/"})
   227вЖТ                continue
   228вЖТ        if repo_root is None or not isinstance(raw_path, str):
   229вЖТ            continue
   230вЖТ        candidate = repo_root / raw_path
   231вЖТ        try:
   232вЖТ            # Missing canonical artifacts are readiness gaps, not containment
   233вЖТ            # failures.  Resolve without requiring existence, then let the
   234вЖТ            # is_file check below classify the missing artifact explicitly.
   235вЖТ            artifact = contained(candidate, repo_root, must_exist=False)
   236вЖТ        except (ContractError, OSError) as exc:
   237вЖТ            findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "artifact_path_invalid", "detail": str(exc)})
   238вЖТ            continue
   239вЖТ        if not artifact.is_file():
   240вЖТ            findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "artifact_missing", "detail": raw_path})
   241вЖТ            continue
   242вЖТ        try:
   243вЖТ            frontmatter = frontmatter_of(artifact)
   244вЖТ        except ContractError as exc:
   245вЖТ            findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "frontmatter_invalid", "detail": str(exc)})
   246вЖТ            continue
   247вЖТ        for key in sorted(required_frontmatter - set(frontmatter)):
   248вЖТ            findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "frontmatter_missing", "detail": key})
   249вЖТ        for key in ("graph_node_id", "artifact_kind", "file_path", "template_id", "template_version"):
   250вЖТ            if key in node and frontmatter.get(key) != node.get(key):
   251вЖТ                findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "frontmatter_parity_error", "detail": key})
   252вЖТ    return findings

   255вЖТdef domain_findings(nodes: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
   256вЖТ    findings: list[dict[str, str]] = []
   257вЖТ    ids: list[str] = []
   258вЖТ    by_id: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
   259вЖТ    for index, node in enumerate(nodes):
   260вЖТ        node_id = node.get("graph_node_id") or node.get("id")
   261вЖТ        loc = str(node_id or f"nodes[{index}]")
   262вЖТ        if not isinstance(node_id, str) or not node_id:
   263вЖТ            findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "missing_id", "detail": "graph_node_id required"})
   264вЖТ            continue
   265вЖТ        ids.append(node_id)
   266вЖТ        by_id[node_id] = node
   267вЖТ        kind = node.get("artifact_kind", node.get("kind"))
   268вЖТ        if kind is not None and kind not in ROOT_BY_KIND:
   269вЖТ            findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "invalid_kind", "detail": str(kind)})
   270вЖТ        if node.get("status") not in {"draft", "active", "blocked", "done", "closed", "tombstoned"}:
   271вЖТ            findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "invalid_status", "detail": str(node.get("status"))})
   272вЖТ        dependencies = node.get("depends_on", [])
   273вЖТ        if not isinstance(dependencies, list) or any(not isinstance(value, str) for value in dependencies):
   274вЖТ            findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "invalid_dependencies", "detail": "depends_on must be string[]"})
   275вЖТ        if node.get("tracker_binding") == "beads" and (node.get("github_publication") or {}).get("mode") != "local_only":
   276вЖТ            findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "beads_publication", "detail": "beads requires local_only"})
   277вЖТ        if node.get("tracker_binding") == "github" and node.get("beads_linkage") is not None:
   278вЖТ            findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "binding_collision", "detail": "github cannot have beads_linkage"})
   279вЖТ        if node.get("status") == "active":
   280вЖТ            readiness = (node.get("implementation_readiness") or {}).get("status")
   281вЖТ            if node.get("confirmation_status") != "confirmed" or node.get("evaluation_status") != "pass" or readiness != "complete":
   282вЖТ                findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "active_not_ready", "detail": "active requires confirmed/pass/complete"})
   283вЖТ        if node.get("tracker_binding") == "repo-config-default":
   284вЖТ            findings.append({"node": loc, "code": "unresolved_tracker_binding", "detail": "durable graph cannot retain repo-config-default"})
   285вЖТ    for duplicate, count in Counter(ids).items():
   286вЖТ        if count > 1:
   287вЖТ            findings.append({"node": duplicate, "code": "duplicate_id", "detail": str(count)})
   288вЖТ    reference_fields = ("depends_on", "related_nodes", "architecture_refs")
   289вЖТ    for index, node in enumerate(nodes):
   290вЖТ        node_id = str(node.get("graph_node_id") or node.get("id") or f"nodes[{index}]")
   291вЖТ        for field in reference_fields:
   292вЖТ            for reference in node.get(field, []) if isinstance(node.get(field, []), list) else []:
   293вЖТ                if reference not in by_id:
   294вЖТ                    code = "dangling_dependency" if field == "depends_on" else "dangling_reference"
   295вЖТ                    findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": code, "detail": f"{field}:{reference}"})
   296вЖТ        parent = node.get("parent_feature")
   297вЖТ        if isinstance(parent, str) and parent not in by_id:
   298вЖТ            findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "dangling_reference", "detail": f"parent_feature:{parent}"})
   299вЖТ
   300вЖТ    state: dict[str, int] = {}
   301вЖТ
   302вЖТ    def visit(node_id: str) -> None:
   303вЖТ        if state.get(node_id) == 1:
   304вЖТ            findings.append({"node": node_id, "code": "dependency_cycle", "detail": node_id})
   305вЖТ            return
   306вЖТ        if state.get(node_id) == 2:
   307вЖТ            return
   308вЖТ        state[node_id] = 1
   309вЖТ        dependencies = by_id[node_id].get("depends_on", [])
   310вЖТ        for dependency in dependencies if isinstance(dependencies, list) else []:
   311вЖТ            if dependency in by_id:
   312вЖТ                visit(dependency)
   313вЖТ        state[node_id] = 2
   314вЖТ
   315вЖТ    for node_id in by_id:
   316вЖТ        visit(node_id)
   317вЖТ
   318вЖТ    children: dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]] = defaultdict(list)
   319вЖТ    for node in nodes:
   320вЖТ        if isinstance(node.get("parent_feature"), str):
   321вЖТ            children[node["parent_feature"]].append(node)
   322вЖТ    order = {phase: int(phase[1:]) for phase in PHASES}
   323вЖТ    for feature_id, feature in ((node_id, node) for node_id, node in by_id.items() if node.get("artifact_kind") == "feature"):
   324вЖТ        members = children.get(feature_id, [])
   325вЖТ        if members or feature.get("status") == "done":
   326вЖТ            packages = {member.get("feature_package_id") for member in members}
   327вЖТ            phases = [member.get("phase_ref") for member in members]
   328вЖТ            if packages == {None} or len(packages) != 1 or set(phases) != PHASES or len(members) != 13:
   329вЖТ                findings.append({"node": feature_id, "code": "feature_package_not_exact_13", "detail": f"count={len(members)} phases={sorted(str(value) for value in set(phases))}"})
   330вЖТ        for child in members:
   331вЖТ            current = order.get(child.get("phase_ref"), 0)
   332вЖТ            for dependency in child.get("depends_on", []):
   333вЖТ                target = by_id.get(dependency, {})
   334вЖТ                if target.get("parent_feature") == feature_id and order.get(target.get("phase_ref"), 0) >= current:
   335вЖТ                    findings.append({"node": str(child.get("graph_node_id") or child.get("id") or "?"), "code": "non_forward_phase_dependency", "detail": dependency})
   336вЖТ        if feature.get("status") == "done":
   337вЖТ            if any(member.get("status") != "done" for member in members):
   338вЖТ                findings.append({"node": feature_id, "code": "premature_feature_done", "detail": "all 13 children must be done"})
   339вЖТ            for phase in {"P07", "P10", "P11"}:
   340вЖТ                child = next((member for member in members if member.get("phase_ref") == phase), {})
   341вЖТ                if not (child.get("completion_evidence") or {}).get("evidence_refs"):
   342вЖТ                    findings.append({"node": feature_id, "code": "feature_evidence_missing", "detail": phase})
   343вЖТ    return findings
   344вЖТ
   345вЖТ
   346вЖТdef validate(
   347вЖТ    nodes: list[dict[str, Any]], schema: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
   348вЖТ    *, repo_root: Path | None = None, template_contract: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
   349вЖТ) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
   350вЖТ    canonical_schema = schema or load_json(SCHEMA_PATH)
   351вЖТ    if not isinstance(canonical_schema, dict):
   352вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"canonical graph schema must be an object: {SCHEMA_PATH}")
   353вЖТ    contract = template_contract or load_json(TEMPLATE_CONTRACT_PATH)
   354вЖТ    if not isinstance(contract, dict):
   355вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"template contract must be an object: {TEMPLATE_CONTRACT_PATH}")
   356вЖТ    findings = [item for index, node in enumerate(nodes) for item in schema_findings(node, canonical_schema, index)]
   357вЖТ    findings.extend(domain_findings(nodes))
   358вЖТ    findings.extend(artifact_findings(nodes, repo_root, contract))
   359вЖТ    return sorted(findings, key=lambda item: (item["node"], item["code"], item["detail"]))
   360вЖТ
   361вЖТ
   362вЖТdef main() -> int:
   363вЖТ    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
   364вЖТ    parser.add_argument("--graph", required=True)
   365вЖТ    parser.add_argument("--repo-root")
   366вЖТ    args = parser.parse_args()
   367вЖТ    graph = Path(args.graph).expanduser().resolve(strict=True)
   368вЖТ    nodes = nodes_of(load_json(graph))
   369вЖТ    violations = validate(nodes, repo_root=_repo_root_for(graph, args.repo_root))
   370вЖТ    missing = sorted({
   371вЖТ        item["detail"] for item in violations
   372вЖТ        if item["code"] in {"frontmatter_missing", "artifact_missing"}
   373вЖТ        or (item["code"] == "schema_violation" and "required property" in item["detail"])
   374вЖТ    })
   375вЖТ    dump({
   376вЖТ        "valid": not violations,
   377вЖТ        "implementation_readiness": "complete" if not violations else "incomplete",
   378вЖТ        "missing_sections": missing,
   379вЖТ        "schema": str(SCHEMA_PATH),
   380вЖТ        "violations": violations,
   381вЖТ    })
   382вЖТ    return 0 if not violations else 1
   383вЖТ
   384вЖТ
   385вЖТif __name__ == "__main__":
   386вЖТ    try:
   387вЖТ        raise SystemExit(main())
   388вЖТ    except (ContractError, OSError) as exc:
   389вЖТ        print(str(exc), file=sys.stderr)
   390вЖТ        raise SystemExit(2)

1вЖТ#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2вЖТ# /// script
     3вЖТ# name: resolve-repo-context
     4вЖТ# purpose: Resolve and verify worktree content authority and shared Git coordination authority.
     5вЖТ# inputs: ["argv: --repo-root PATH? --config PATH --mode read|write"]
     6вЖТ# outputs: ["stdout: JSON repository/worktree context"]
     7вЖТ# requires-python = ">=3.10"
     8вЖТ# dependencies: []
     9вЖТ# contexts: [A, B, C, E]
    10вЖТ# network: false
    11вЖТ# write-scope: none
    12вЖТ# ///
    13вЖТfrom __future__ import annotations
    14вЖТ
    15вЖТimport argparse
    16вЖТimport hashlib
    17вЖТimport os
    18вЖТimport re
    19вЖТimport sys
    20вЖТfrom pathlib import Path
    21вЖТfrom typing import Any
    22вЖТ
    23вЖТfrom _common import ContractError, contained, dump, git, load_json, stable_id
    24вЖТ
    25вЖТ
    26вЖТDEFAULT_CONTENT_ROOTS = {
    27вЖТ    "issues": "issues",
    28вЖТ    "tasks": "tasks",
    29вЖТ    "specifications": "specs",
    30вЖТ    "architecture": "architecture",
    31вЖТ    "features": "features",
    32вЖТ    "documents": "docs",
    33вЖТ    "system_spec": "system-spec",
    34вЖТ}
    35вЖТDEFAULT_LOCAL_STATE = {
    36вЖТ    "graph": ".dev-graph/state/graph.json",
    37вЖТ    "cache": ".dev-graph/cache",
    38вЖТ    "locks": ".dev-graph/locks",
    39вЖТ}
    40вЖТGITHUB_REMOTE = re.compile(
    41вЖТ    r"^(?:https?://github\.com/|ssh://git@github\.com/|git@github\.com:)([^/]+)/(.+?)(?:\.git)?/?$",
    42вЖТ    re.IGNORECASE,
    43вЖТ)
    44вЖТ
    45вЖТ
    46вЖТdef discover(explicit: str | None) -> tuple[Path, str]:
    47вЖТ    choices: list[tuple[str, str]] = []
    48вЖТ    if explicit:
    49вЖТ        choices.append((explicit, "explicit --repo-root"))
    50вЖТ    trusted = os.environ.get("CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")
    51вЖТ    if trusted:
    52вЖТ        choices.append((trusted, "CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"))
    53вЖТ    cp = __import__("subprocess").run(
    54вЖТ        ["git", "rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"], text=True, capture_output=True, check=False
    55вЖТ    )
    56вЖТ    if cp.returncode == 0:
    57вЖТ        choices.append((cp.stdout.strip(), "git toplevel"))
    58вЖТ    for parent in (Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents):
    59вЖТ        if (parent / ".git").exists() or (parent / ".dev-graph").is_dir():
    60вЖТ            choices.append((str(parent), "cwd marker"))
    61вЖТ            break
    62вЖТ    if not choices:
    63вЖТ        raise ContractError("repository root cannot be resolved")
    64вЖТ    root = Path(choices[0][0]).expanduser().resolve(strict=True)
    65вЖТ    actual = Path(git(["rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"], root)).resolve(strict=True)
    66вЖТ    if root != actual:
    67вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"selected root is not current worktree root: {root} != {actual}")
    68вЖТ    if trusted and Path(trusted).expanduser().resolve(strict=True) != root:
    69вЖТ        raise ContractError("--repo-root and CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR disagree")
    70вЖТ    return root, choices[0][1]
    71вЖТ
    72вЖТ
    73вЖТdef repository_id_for(remote: str, common: Path) -> str:
    74вЖТ    """Derive the durable repository identity from the canonical authority."""
    75вЖТ    match = GITHUB_REMOTE.fullmatch(remote.strip()) if remote else None
    76вЖТ    if match:
    77вЖТ        owner, repository = match.groups()
    78вЖТ        return f"github:{owner}/{repository.removesuffix('.git')}"
    79вЖТ    digest = hashlib.sha256(str(common.resolve(strict=True)).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
    80вЖТ    return f"local:sha256:{digest}"
    81вЖТ
    82вЖТ
    83вЖТdef _absolute_git_path(raw: str, root: Path) -> Path:
    84вЖТ    path = Path(raw)
    85вЖТ    return (root / path).resolve(strict=True) if not path.is_absolute() else path.resolve(strict=True)
    86вЖТ
    87вЖТ
    88вЖТdef verify_common_ownership(root: Path, git_dir: Path, common: Path) -> None:
    89вЖТ    """Prove that the selected worktree and common directory are one repository."""
    90вЖТ    try:
    91вЖТ        objects = _absolute_git_path(git(["rev-parse", "--git-path", "objects"], root), root)
    92вЖТ        config = _absolute_git_path(git(["rev-parse", "--git-path", "config"], root), root)
    93вЖТ        common_objects = (common / "objects").resolve(strict=True)
    94вЖТ        common_config = (common / "config").resolve(strict=True)
    95вЖТ    except OSError as exc:
    96вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"git common dir authority is incomplete: {common}: {exc}") from exc
    97вЖТ    if objects != common_objects:
    98вЖТ        raise ContractError("git common dir objects authority does not belong to selected repository")
    99вЖТ    if config != common_config:
   100вЖТ        raise ContractError("git common dir config authority does not belong to selected repository")
   101вЖТ    if git_dir != common:
   102вЖТ        marker = git_dir / "commondir"
   103вЖТ        if not marker.is_file() or marker.is_symlink():
   104вЖТ            raise ContractError(f"worktree git dir has no trusted commondir marker: {marker}")
   105вЖТ        try:
   106вЖТ            declared = (git_dir / marker.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip()).resolve(strict=True)
   107вЖТ        except OSError as exc:
   108вЖТ            raise ContractError(f"invalid worktree commondir marker: {marker}: {exc}") from exc
   109вЖТ        if declared != common:
   110вЖТ            raise ContractError(f"worktree commondir mismatch: {declared} != {common}")
   111вЖТ    root_remote = git(["remote", "get-url", "origin"], root, check=False)
   112вЖТ    common_remote = git(["--git-dir", str(common), "remote", "get-url", "origin"], root, check=False)
   113вЖТ    if root_remote != common_remote:
   114вЖТ        raise ContractError("worktree and git common dir resolve different origin remotes")
   115вЖТ
   116вЖТ
   117вЖТdef _validate_relative(raw: Any, label: str) -> Path:
   118вЖТ    if not isinstance(raw, str) or not raw or "\x00" in raw:
   119вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"{label} must be a non-empty repository-relative path")
   120вЖТ    relative = Path(raw)
   121вЖТ    if relative.is_absolute() or ".." in relative.parts:
   122вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"{label} escapes repository authority: {raw}")
   123вЖТ    return relative
   124вЖТ
   125вЖТ
   126вЖТdef resolve_declared_path(root: Path, raw: Any, label: str, *, reject_leaf_symlink: bool) -> Path:
   127вЖТ    """Resolve an existing target or its longest existing parent without escaping root."""
   128вЖТ    relative = _validate_relative(raw, label)
   129вЖТ    candidate = root / relative
   130вЖТ    current = root
   131вЖТ    for part in relative.parts:
   132вЖТ        current = current / part
   133вЖТ        if current.is_symlink():
   134вЖТ            try:
   135вЖТ                target = current.resolve(strict=True)
   136вЖТ            except OSError as exc:
   137вЖТ                raise ContractError(f"broken content symlink for {label}: {current}: {exc}") from exc
   138вЖТ            contained(target, root)
   139вЖТ            if reject_leaf_symlink:
   140вЖТ                raise ContractError(f"content root path must not traverse a symlink: {label}={current}")
   141вЖТ        if not current.exists() and not current.is_symlink():
   142вЖТ            break
   143вЖТ    try:
   144вЖТ        resolved = candidate.resolve(strict=True) if candidate.exists() or candidate.is_symlink() else candidate.resolve(strict=False)
   145вЖТ    except OSError as exc:
   146вЖТ        raise ContractError(f"cannot resolve {label}: {candidate}: {exc}") from exc
   147вЖТ    contained(resolved, root, must_exist=False)
   148вЖТ    return resolved
   149вЖТ
   150вЖТ
   151вЖТdef resolve_config_paths(root: Path, config: dict[str, Any] | None) -> tuple[dict[str, str], dict[str, str]]:
   152вЖТ    config = config or {}
   153вЖТ    policy = config.get("path_policy") or {}
   154вЖТ    if not isinstance(policy, dict):
   155вЖТ        raise ContractError("path_policy must be an object")
   156вЖТ    forbidden = (
   157вЖТ        policy.get("authority") not in {None, "caller-repository"}
   158вЖТ        or policy.get("allow_outside_repository") not in {None, False}
   159вЖТ        or policy.get("follow_content_symlinks_outside_repository") not in {None, False}
   160вЖТ    )
   161вЖТ    if forbidden:
   162вЖТ        raise ContractError("path_policy weakens caller-repository containment")
   163вЖТ    content = config.get("content_roots") or DEFAULT_CONTENT_ROOTS
   164вЖТ    local = config.get("local_state") or DEFAULT_LOCAL_STATE
   165вЖТ    if not isinstance(content, dict) or not isinstance(local, dict):
   166вЖТ        raise ContractError("content_roots and local_state must be objects")
   167вЖТ    resolved_content = {
   168вЖТ        key: str(resolve_declared_path(root, value, f"content_roots.{key}", reject_leaf_symlink=True))
   169вЖТ        for key, value in sorted(content.items())
   170вЖТ    }
   171вЖТ    resolved_local = {
   172вЖТ        key: str(resolve_declared_path(root, value, f"local_state.{key}", reject_leaf_symlink=False))
   173вЖТ        for key, value in sorted(local.items())
   174вЖТ    }
   175вЖТ    return resolved_content, resolved_local
   176вЖТ
   177вЖТ
   178вЖТdef main() -> int:
   179вЖТ    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
   180вЖТ    parser.add_argument("--repo-root")
   181вЖТ    parser.add_argument("--config", default=".dev-graph/config.json")
   182вЖТ    parser.add_argument("--mode", choices=("read", "write"), default="read")
   183вЖТ    args = parser.parse_args()
   184вЖТ    root, trust = discover(args.repo_root)
   185вЖТ    common_raw = git(["rev-parse", "--git-common-dir"], root)
   186вЖТ    common = Path(common_raw)
   187вЖТ    if not common.is_absolute():
   188вЖТ        common = root / common
   189вЖТ    common = common.resolve(strict=True)
   190вЖТ    git_dir_raw = git(["rev-parse", "--git-dir"], root)
   191вЖТ    git_dir = Path(git_dir_raw)
   192вЖТ    if not git_dir.is_absolute():
   193вЖТ        git_dir = root / git_dir
   194вЖТ    git_dir = git_dir.resolve(strict=True)
   195вЖТ    verify_common_ownership(root, git_dir, common)
   196вЖТ    remote = git(["remote", "get-url", "origin"], root, check=False)
   197вЖТ    repository_id = repository_id_for(remote, common)
   198вЖТ    config_arg = Path(args.config)
   199вЖТ    if config_arg.is_absolute():
   200вЖТ        config_path = contained(config_arg, root, must_exist=False)
   201вЖТ    else:
   202вЖТ        config_path = root / _validate_relative(args.config, "config")
   203вЖТ    config = None
   204вЖТ    diagnostics: list[str] = []
   205вЖТ    if config_path.exists() or config_path.is_symlink():
   206вЖТ        try:
   207вЖТ            config_path = contained(config_path, root)
   208вЖТ        except OSError as exc:
   209вЖТ            raise ContractError(f"broken repository config symlink: {config_path}: {exc}") from exc
   210вЖТ        config = load_json(config_path)
   211вЖТ        if not isinstance(config, dict):
   212вЖТ            raise ContractError("repo config must be a JSON object")
   213вЖТ        configured = config.get("repository_id") if isinstance(config, dict) else None
   214вЖТ        if configured and configured != repository_id:
   215вЖТ            raise ContractError("repo config repository_id does not match derived repository")
   216вЖТ    else:
   217вЖТ        diagnostics.append("config_missing")
   218вЖТ    content_roots, local_state_paths = resolve_config_paths(root, config)
   219вЖТ    branch = git(["symbolic-ref", "--quiet", "--short", "HEAD"], root, check=False) or None
   220вЖТ    head = git(["rev-parse", "HEAD"], root)
   221вЖТ    default_ref = git(["symbolic-ref", "--quiet", "refs/remotes/origin/HEAD"], root, check=False)
   222вЖТ    default_branch = default_ref.rsplit("/", 1)[-1] if default_ref else (
   223вЖТ        ((config or {}).get("worktrees") or {}).get("default_branch") if isinstance(config, dict) else None
   224вЖТ    )
   225вЖТ    if not default_branch:
   226вЖТ        default_branch = "main"
   227вЖТ        diagnostics.append("default_branch_fallback_main")
   228вЖТ    worktree_id = stable_id("wt_", repository_id, str(root))
   229вЖТ    coord = common / "dev-graph"
   230вЖТ    plugin_source = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
   231вЖТ    trusted = os.environ.get("CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR")
   232вЖТ    result = {
   233вЖТ        "repo_root": str(root), "repository_id": repository_id, "worktree_id": worktree_id,
   234вЖТ        "git_common_dir": str(common), "git_dir": str(git_dir), "branch": branch,
   235вЖТ        "head_sha": head, "default_branch": default_branch,
   236вЖТ        "root_trust_evidence": {"selected_by": trust, "git_toplevel_verified": True,
   237вЖТ                                "claude_project_dir_verified": not trusted or Path(trusted).resolve() == root,
   238вЖТ                                "git_common_dir_ownership_verified": True},
   239вЖТ        "content_roots": {"repository": str(root), **content_roots},
   240вЖТ        "local_state_paths": {"config": str(config_path), **local_state_paths},
   241вЖТ        "coordination_paths": {"root": str(coord), "leases": str(coord / "leases.json"),
   242вЖТ                               "events": str(coord / "events.json")},
   243вЖТ        "plugin_source": str(plugin_source), "mode": args.mode, "diagnostics": diagnostics,
   244вЖТ    }
   245вЖТ    dump(result)
   246вЖТ    return 0
   247вЖТ
   248вЖТ
   249вЖТif __name__ == "__main__":
   250вЖТ    try:
   251вЖТ        raise SystemExit(main())
   252вЖТ    except (ContractError, OSError) as exc:
   253вЖТ        print(str(exc), file=sys.stderr)
   254вЖТ        raise SystemExit(1)
   255вЖТ
